sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2025-08-19 17:47
- Distance: 9.1 km
- Moving time: 52:41
- Elapsed time: 55:41
- Elevation gain: 139.8 m
- Average heart rate: 156.6 bpm
- Max heart rate: 174 bpm
- Average watts: 219.3 W
- Average speed: 10.4 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `5` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `157.0 bpm`, ranging from `145.5` to `168.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `151.4 bpm` and second-half average HR was `160.8 bpm` (+9.4 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `161.1 spm`, with a working range of `125.2` to `171.8 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `165.8 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `155.1 spm` (-10.7 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:46 /km` across `9.131 km` in `52:41` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:33 /km` and second-half pace was `6:00 /km` (+27 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `156.6 bpm` average and `174 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `151.6 bpm` in the first half and `161.1 bpm` in the second (+9.5 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `52:41` out of `55:41` elapsed (94.6%), which shows some stop-start interruption.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `9` stop segments and `1.1%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `158.4 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `5.0 m` and `71.6 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `48.2 m` in the first half and `110.2 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
